web-development.title: Full Stack Web Development
web-development.description: Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, APIs, databases and deployment. Build real-world web applications from scratch.

hindi-typing.title: Hindi Typing Mastery
hindi-typing.description: Learn Hindi typing with Remington and Inscript keyboard layouts. Build speed and accuracy from scratch.

english-typing.title: English Touch Typing
english-typing.description: Master touch typing with proper finger placement. Go from hunt-and-peck to 60+ WPM.

english-learning.title: English Language Learning
english-learning.description: From grammar basics to interview-ready English. Build confidence in reading, writing, and speaking.

personality-dev.title: Personality & Skill Development
personality-dev.description: Master communication, leadership, confidence, public speaking and other essential life skills for the modern era.

html-fundamentals.title: HTML Fundamentals
html-fundamentals.description: Master the building blocks of every webpage. Learn HTML tags, forms, tables, semantic elements, and accessibility.

css-mastery.title: CSS Mastery
css-mastery.description: From basic styling to advanced layouts. Master Flexbox, Grid, animations, responsive design, and CSS variables.

javascript-essentials.title: JavaScript Essentials
javascript-essentials.description: From variables to async/await. Master JavaScript fundamentals, DOM manipulation, ES6+, and modern patterns.

web-networking.title: Web Networking & APIs
web-networking.description: Understand HTTP/HTTPS, REST APIs, GraphQL, API gateways, and how the web communicates.

backend-development.title: Backend Development
backend-development.description: Build server-side applications with Node.js, Express, databases, CRUD operations, and error handling.

web-security.title: Web Security & Authentication
web-security.description: JWT, sessions, OAuth, cookies, local storage, CORS, and protecting your applications from attacks.

web-performance.title: Web Performance & Caching
web-performance.description: Loading states, caching strategies, lazy loading, optimization techniques, and error handling best practices.

web-deployment.title: Deployment & DevOps
web-deployment.description: Ship your apps to production. Git, CI/CD, hosting platforms, domains, SSL, and the capstone project.

hindi-keyboard-basics.title: Hindi Keyboard Basics
hindi-keyboard-basics.description: Learn Hindi keyboard layout, finger positioning, and home row keys. Build a solid typing foundation.

hindi-word-building.title: Hindi Word Building
hindi-word-building.description: Master upper and lower rows, common Hindi words, numbers, and symbols.

hindi-speed-fluency.title: Hindi Speed & Fluency
hindi-speed-fluency.description: Type Hindi sentences fluently, build speed, and master advanced typing drills.

english-typing-foundations.title: English Typing Foundations
english-typing-foundations.description: Introduction to touch typing, home row keys ASDF and JKL. Build proper finger placement habits.

english-typing-mastery.title: English Keyboard Mastery
english-typing-mastery.description: Master upper row, lower row, shift keys, and all keyboard sections for complete coverage.

english-typing-advanced.title: English Typing Speed & Accuracy
english-typing-advanced.description: Common words, sentences, paragraphs, and timed speed drills. Reach 60+ WPM.

english-grammar-basics.title: English Grammar Basics
english-grammar-basics.description: Alphabet, pronunciation, nouns, pronouns, articles, verbs, and present tense. Build a grammar foundation.

english-tenses-structure.title: English Tenses & Sentence Structure
english-tenses-structure.description: Past and future tenses, sentence structure (SVO), questions, negation, and prepositions.

english-vocabulary-grammar.title: Vocabulary & Advanced Grammar
english-vocabulary-grammar.description: Vocabulary building techniques, active/passive voice, conjunctions, and advanced grammar patterns.

english-professional.title: Professional English & Communication
english-professional.description: Daily conversations, essay writing, paragraph structure, and interview-ready professional English.

self-awareness-mindset.title: Self-Awareness & Mindset
self-awareness-mindset.description: Emotional intelligence, self-awareness, confidence building, and developing a growth mindset.

communication-skills.title: Communication Skills
communication-skills.description: Effective speaking, active listening, body language, non-verbal cues, and the art of clear communication.

productivity-wellness.title: Productivity & Wellness
productivity-wellness.description: Time management, stress management, work-life balance, and mental health strategies.

leadership-teamwork.title: Leadership & Teamwork
leadership-teamwork.description: Lead teams, make decisions, resolve conflicts, delegate effectively, and inspire others.

career-development.title: Career Development & Networking
career-development.description: Public speaking, professional networking, personal branding, goal setting, and career planning.
